author: doll-agent
content: Plan: when issue #681 (the 0.3.0 release issue) was closed, the crosslink hook auto-appended its title under the [0.2.11] section in CHANGELOG.md (the hook always appends to the most recent dated header it can parse, which is 0.2.11 since 0.3.0 has the date that matches today). #681 is curated under the [0.3.0] -> Notes section instead. Removing the auto-appended duplicate.
